function.name: appraise_chrysoberyl_grade
function.description: Appraise the gemological grade of a chrysoberyl stone based on color, clarity, and carat.

prompt: Appraise a chrysoberyl that is honey-yellow, VS1 clarity, weighing 2.4 carats.

function.name: compute_rheology_master_curve
function.description: Compute a polymer rheology master curve using time-temperature superposition.

prompt: Build a TTS master curve for HDPE at reference temperature 190 C over 0.01-100 Hz.

function.name: assess_kiln_cone_collapse
function.description: Predict at which Orton cone a ceramic kiln load will collapse for a given firing schedule.

prompt: Will a porcelain body collapse if I fire to cone 10 at 150 C/hour?

function.name: lookup_alloy_phase_diagram
function.description: Look up phase regions of a binary alloy at a given composition and temperature.

prompt: What phases exist in Fe-C at 0.8 wt% carbon and 750 C?

function.name: estimate_electroplating_thickness
function.description: Estimate deposited coating thickness from electroplating parameters.

prompt: Estimate nickel plating thickness at 4 A/dm2 over 25 minutes.

function.name: design_asphalt_marshall_mix
function.description: Design an asphalt mix using the Marshall method with given aggregate and binder.

prompt: Design a Marshall mix with dense-graded aggregate, PG64-22 binder, for 3e6 ESALs.

function.name: test_pv_cell_iv_curve
function.description: Run an I-V curve test on a photovoltaic cell under specified illumination.

prompt: Run an I-V sweep on cell PV-A18 at 1000 W/m2 and 25 C.

function.name: analyze_paper_coating_gloss
function.description: Measure gloss of a paper coating at a specified angle.

prompt: Measure 75-degree gloss on paper sample SC-204.

function.name: schedule_enfleurage_extraction
function.description: Plan an enfleurage perfumery extraction with chosen pomade fat and floral.

prompt: Plan a tuberose enfleurage with tallow fat over 30 charge cycles.

function.name: calc_optical_glass_anneal_time
function.description: Calculate fine-anneal hold time for optical glass to reduce stress birefringence.

prompt: How long should I fine-anneal a 40mm slab of BK7 to reach 2 nm/cm residual stress?

function.name: grade_tanzanite_pleochroism
function.description: Grade pleochroic axes intensity of a tanzanite specimen.

heated.description: Heat treatment status yes or no

prompt: Grade pleochroism for tanzanite stone TZ-77, untreated.

function.name: evaluate_zircon_metamictization
function.description: Evaluate degree of metamictization in a zircon sample via density and refractive index.

prompt: Evaluate zircon metamictization: density 4.20 g/cm3 and RI 1.85.

function.name: compute_glaze_seger_formula
function.description: Convert a ceramic glaze recipe to Seger unity molecular formula.

prompt: Convert this glaze recipe to Seger formula on RO unity: SiO2 65%, Al2O3 12%, CaO 15%, K2O 8%.

function.name: predict_pearlite_lamellar_spacing
function.description: Predict pearlite lamellar spacing in steel from isothermal transformation temperature.

prompt: Predict pearlite spacing for 0.77 wt% C steel held at 650 C.

function.name: simulate_electroless_nickel_bath
function.description: Simulate steady-state composition of an electroless nickel-phosphorus bath.

prompt: Simulate an EN bath at pH 4.8, 88 C, 30 g/L sodium hypophosphite.

function.name: rate_bitumen_penetration
function.description: Rate a bitumen sample by needle penetration at standard conditions.

prompt: Rate bitumen sample BT-9 measuring 65 dmm penetration.

function.name: measure_pv_module_fill_factor
function.description: Compute fill factor from a PV module's measured I-V characteristics.

prompt: Compute fill factor with Voc=37.5V, Isc=9.2A, Pmax=280W.

function.name: test_paper_cobb_absorption
function.description: Run a Cobb test to measure water absorption of coated paper.

prompt: Run Cobb-60 test on paper sample CP-12.

function.name: extract_rose_otto_yield
function.description: Estimate steam-distillation yield of rose otto from petals.

prompt: Estimate rose otto yield from 4000 kg of Rosa damascena Kazanlik petals.

function.name: compute_glass_strain_point
function.description: Compute strain point temperature of optical glass from viscosity data.

prompt: Compute strain point for SF6 glass at log viscosity 14.5 poise.

function.name: appraise_opal_play_of_color
function.description: Appraise an opal's play-of-color directionality and dominant hue.

prompt: Appraise a black opal with dominant red flash and harlequin pattern.

function.name: fit_carreau_yasuda_model
function.description: Fit Carreau-Yasuda viscosity model to shear-rate sweep data.

prompt: Fit Carreau-Yasuda to: rates 0.1,1,10,100 1/s and viscosities 1200,800,300,90 Pa.s.

function.name: plan_bisque_firing_schedule
function.description: Plan bisque firing schedule including ramps, holds and cool-down.

prompt: Plan a bisque firing schedule for cone 06 stoneware that is 12 mm thick.

function.name: calc_jominy_hardenability
function.description: Predict Jominy end-quench hardenability curve for a steel grade.

distance_mm.description: Distance from quenched end in mm

prompt: Compute Jominy hardness at 10 mm for 4140 steel.

function.name: lookup_pourbaix_diagram
function.description: Look up the stable phase from a Pourbaix diagram at specified pH and potential.

prompt: What is the stable phase of iron at pH 6 and 0.2 V vs SHE?

function.name: design_superpave_binder
function.description: Recommend Superpave PG binder for given climate envelope.

prompt: Recommend a Superpave binder for a region with 58 C high and -28 C low pavement temperatures.

function.name: test_perc_module_lid_degradation
function.description: Test light-induced degradation on PERC photovoltaic modules.

prompt: Test LID on PERC module PM-501 after 96 hours light soaking.

function.name: measure_paper_smoothness_bekk
function.description: Measure Bekk smoothness of coated paper.

prompt: Measure Bekk smoothness on the felt side of sample PP-018.

function.name: compose_fragrance_chypre_accord
function.description: Compose a chypre fragrance accord from oakmoss, labdanum, bergamot ratios.

prompt: Compose a classical chypre with 18% oakmoss, 22% labdanum, 35% bergamot.

function.name: calc_low_expansion_glass_seal
function.description: Calculate seal compatibility between a low-expansion glass and a metal.

prompt: Check seal compatibility between Kovar and 7052 glass at 1000 C.

function.name: identify_spinel_inclusions
function.description: Identify diagnostic mineral inclusions in a spinel via microscopy notes.

prompt: Identify inclusions in a Mogok spinel showing octahedral apatite crystals.

function.name: fit_williams_landel_ferry
function.description: Fit WLF shift-factor coefficients C1 and C2 from temperature-shift data.

prompt: Fit WLF for temperatures 100,120,140,160 C with log aT 0,-1.2,-2.4,-3.5 referenced at 100 C.

function.name: estimate_raku_thermal_shock
function.description: Estimate thermal shock survival probability for a raku ceramic body.

prompt: Will a grogged raku body survive a 950 to 200 C air quench?

function.name: calc_widmanstaetten_pattern_etch
function.description: Recommend etchant and time to reveal Widmanstatten pattern in iron meteorite.

function.name: tune_chromium_plating_hex
function.description: Tune hexavalent chromium plating bath parameters.

prompt: Tune a hex chrome bath: 250 g/L CrO3, 2.5 g/L sulfate, 40 A/dm2.

function.description: Evaluate skid resistance of an SMA asphalt mix aggregate.

function.name: test_paper_tappi_brightness
function.description: Measure TAPPI brightness of a coated paper grade.

prompt: Measure TAPPI brightness on sample PW-44 at 457 nm.

function.name: extract_jasmine_absolute_ratio
function.description: Compute solvent-to-flower ratio for jasmine absolute extraction.

function.name: calc_glass_devit_risk
function.description: Estimate devitrification risk for optical glass at a specific hold temperature.

prompt: Estimate devit risk for N-LAK22 held at 720 C for 90 minutes.

function.name: grade_padparadscha_hue
function.description: Grade hue authenticity for a padparadscha sapphire.

prompt: Grade a padparadscha described as salmon-pink with medium saturation.

function.description: Predict extrudate die swell ratio for a polymer melt.

prompt: Predict die swell for LDPE at 240 C and shear rate 100 1/s.

function.description: Design a eutectic glaze flux mixture for low-temperature firing.

prompt: Design a Na2O-CaO eutectic flux melting near 780 C.

function.name: calc_ttt_diagram_nose
function.description: Locate the nose of a TTT diagram for an alloy.

prompt: Locate the bainite nose on the TTT diagram for AISI 1080.

function.description: Audit recycled asphalt pavement (RAP) content for a job mix.

prompt: Evaluate perovskite cell PK-009 stability after 1000 hours ISOS-L1.

function.description: Measure Mullen burst strength of a paperboard sample.

prompt: Measure Mullen burst on sample PB-77 of 250 gsm.

function.description: Plan an ambergris tincture maceration for fragrance use.

prompt: Macerate 3 grams of grey ambergris in 95% ethanol for 12 weeks.

function.name: calc_glass_abbe_number

function.description: Grade a jadeite specimen on the Imperial green scale.

function.description: Compute tan-delta peak temperature from DMA sweep.
